title: New Zealand v Egypt | World Cup | Match Preview
original_text:
New Zealand and Egypt are set to clash for the first time at a World Cup in this Group G encounter at BC Place Vancouver.
Group GGroup G
Sunday, 21 June | BC Place Vancouver
Kick-off timeKick-off time
18:00 (Vancouver) | 13:00 (Wellington) 22 June | 04:00 (Cairo) 22 June
The matchThe match
The All Whites and the Pharaohs will meet for the first time at a FIFA World Cup when they clash in their second Group G outing at BC Place Vancouver. New Zealand are at the global finals for a third time and targeting a maiden group stage progression. Egypt are at a fourth World Cup and will be looking to improve on a Round of 16 finish from back in 1934.

Host City: VancouverHost City: Vancouver
A taste of what’s to come from this FIFA World Cup 26™ Host City.A taste of what’s to come from this FIFA World Cup 26™ Host City.
Now into its fifth decade of existence, BC Place Vancouver remains a jaw-dropping piece of architecture situated on the banks of the False Creek inlet.
The area - which has recently undergone renovations – is the home of MLS team Vancouver Whitecaps and the Canadian Football League's (CFL) BC Lions, and has also occasionally hosted the Canada national team.
One of the most memorable matches at BC Place Vancouver came when the venue hosted the final of the FIFA Women’s World Cup 2015™, where USA defeated defending champions Japan 5-2, thanks in no small part to a three-goal haul from Carli Lloyd inside the opening 15 minutes.
